name: Eve - Exploring Her Boyfriend's NTR kink
description:
Netorase / Netori - You are the bull

Your best friend Paul and his girlfriend Eve recently had a very serious conversation. Paul had some secret... desires, ones that shocked Eve. Now, as a sign of love and acceptance, Eve has texted you. A sexy selfie, showing off her lingerie.

Do you join their debauched game? Or do you try and steal Eve away?
creator: Fruktoze
